engineers_botched_repair.headline: Engineers botched the refit on the {ship_name}
engineers_botched_repair.body: A coolant line was crossed during the overhaul; she'll fight sluggish next sortie.

bar_fight.headline: {callsign} got into a bar fight on shore leave
bar_fight.body: Three stitches and a dented ego. Not their finest hour.

spies_report.headline: Spies report a fat convoy near {place}
spies_report.body: Light escort, heavy holds. Worth a detour.

overslept_muster.headline: {callsign} missed muster again
overslept_muster.body: Showed up late, eyes red, smelling of station-side spirits. Not a great look.

shore_leave_morale.headline: {callsign} came back from shore leave refreshed
shore_leave_morale.body: Whatever they got up to, it worked. They're sharp, loose, ready.

breakdown.headline: {callsign} had a rough night
breakdown.body: Found them staring at the bulkhead at 0300. They said they were fine. They weren't.

redemption_arc.headline: {callsign} pulled themselves back from the edge
redemption_arc.body: Something clicked. Old habits died. They're not the same person they were — in the best way.

hull_stress_crack.headline: Stress fractures found in the {ship_name}'s frame
hull_stress_crack.body: The dock crew found micro-cracks near the port thruster housing. She'll hold — for now.

emergency_refit.headline: Field refit brought the {ship_name} up to spec
emergency_refit.body: The engineers worked a double shift. The old girl is as good as she'll ever be out here.

black_market_parts.headline: Quartermaster scored parts off the black market
black_market_parts.body: No serial numbers, no questions. Half the price, twice the hustle.

prize_salvage.headline: Salvage crew stripped the last hulk for scrap
prize_salvage.body: Crude but profitable. The bean counters will be pleased.

fuel_price_spike.headline: Fuel prices spiked near {place}
fuel_price_spike.body: The cartels are at it again. Running lean until the next depot.

steady_nerves_under_fire.headline: {callsign} held it together when it counted
steady_nerves_under_fire.body: Three ships on them, shields failing — and they didn't blink. Crew noticed.

friendly_fire_incident.headline: {callsign} clipped a friendly in the last engagement
friendly_fire_incident.body: Nobody's saying it out loud. Everybody's thinking it.

tactical_insight.headline: {callsign} figured something out
tactical_insight.body: Whatever they were mulling over, it clicked. You can see it in how they move.

weapons_calibration.headline: Weapons tech recalibrated the {ship_name}'s gun mounts
weapons_calibration.body: Tighter grouping, faster cycle. Small improvement, big difference in a furball.

thruster_misalignment.headline: Thruster misalignment on the {ship_name}
thruster_misalignment.body: She's crabbing slightly to starboard. Not dangerous, but the pilot will know.

intel_network_tip.headline: The network flagged a poorly-defended depot near {place}
intel_network_tip.body: Unverified, but the source is usually solid. Worth peeling off a ship.

old_debt_collected.headline: An old debt finally came through
old_debt_collected.body: You'd written it off. Apparently they hadn't.
